code:
--- config: theme: dark --- flowchart TD tiny_damnation[IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] click tiny_damnation callback " Tiny Damnation

Cost: 5 motes
Duration: One day
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 1
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: None

The effects of this Charm always fade by the next morning's sunrise, and it may not be cast more than once per day on the same target. Some possible curses:
• One dot lost from an Ability of the spirit's choosing.
• The loss of one temporary Willpower point.
• The loss of two motes of Essence.
• Bad luck: the target loses one die from any normal Ability checks (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) that relate to the way in which the target offended the spirit. " imprecation[IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] tiny_damnation --> imprecation click imprecation callback " Imprecation

Cost: 10 motes
Duration: One week
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 1
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Tiny Damnation

The effects of this Charm last for one week, and it may not be cast more than once per week on the same target. Some possible curses:
• Loss of two Ability dots, distributed as the spirit sees fit.
• The loss of two temporary Willpower points.
• The loss of one Attribute dot of the spirit's choosing.
• The loss of five motes of Essence.
• Bad luck: the target removes one die from normal Ability checks (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController).
• A mark appears in an obvious place on the target
that only spirits or Exalted with some sort of supernatural sight can see. This may, for example, urge any spirits who meet the target to torment him. " malediction[IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] imprecation --> malediction click malediction callback " Malediction

Cost: 15 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: One week
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 2
Minimum Essence: 4
Prerequisite Charms: Imprecation

The effects of this Charm last for one week, and it may not be used on a target more than once every two weeks. Some possible effects:
• Loss of four Ability points, distributed as the spirit sees fit.
• Loss of two Attribute points, distributed as the spirit sees fit.
• Loss of three temporary Willpower points.
• Loss of ten motes of Essence.
• Bad luck: the target removes one die from both normal Ability checks and Charm checks.
• The effects of one Charm (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) that the spirit possesses may be conferred upon the target, but that effect is twisted in some way. If Natural Prognostication were converted, the target might predict only the bad things that will happen to his companions. Or his predictions might be more than a little mixed up. Landscape Travel, if cast on someone traveling through a forest, might force him to travel through the trees and prevent him from ever touching the ground. I his twisted Charm lasts tor no more than one week. " scourge[IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] malediction --> scourge click scourge callback " Scourge

Cost: 20 motes, l permanent Willpower
Duration: Instant
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 3
Minimum Essence: 5
Prerequisite Charms: Malediction

This curse is never cast lightly, and it may not be cast more than once per year. Only spirits that have been drastically wronged in heinous ways would consider using this curse (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic).
• Loss of one Attribute point, permanently. It must be bought back up through practice (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic), Against a mortal character, this Charm also permanently lowers the character's maximum score in that Ability by one.
• Loss of two Ability points, permanently, distributed as the spirit sees fit. Only practice and experience points may buy this back up again.
• Loss of one permanent Willpower point.
• Loss of one permanent Essence point.
• Loss of all temporary Willpower.
• The effects of one Charm (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) that the spirit possesses may be conferred upon the target, but the effect is twisted in some way (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker). This lasts for twice as long as the Charm would normally last. In rare cases (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) the effect may be permanent.
• Bad luck: the target attracts ill-intentioned spirits wherever he goes. Duration permanent.
• The spirit may permanently change some physical feature of the target, such as facial hair or eye color. (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) " subgraph Players Guide conditional_curse[IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] click conditional_curse callback " Conditional Curse

Cost: 3 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: Until Calibration
Type: Simple
Minimum Compassion/Valor: 2
Minimum Essence: 4
Prerequisite Charms: Benefaction/Imprecation

With these Charms, a spirit may place a mark of Essence upon a target in its line of sight as a delayed trigger for another Charm. If the delayed effect has a positive intent, the spirit must know and use the Compassion Charm Conditional Blessing. A negative or harmful intent requires the Valor Charm Conditional Curse. A Manipulation + Compassion/ Valor roll against a difficulty of the target's Essence is neces- sary to inscribe the mark. If this roll succeeds, the spirit chooses one Charm it knows that can directly affect that target. If the selected Charm has multiple uses or permuta- tions, the spirit must also select the exact effects the Charm will take. The spirit then establishes the precise actions the target must perform to trigger the delayed Charm.
The spirit may include as many conditions as desired, any of which may be as elaborate or straightforward as desired. For example, the spirit may decide to heal a loyal shaman with Touch of Grace if she speaks a specific prayer petitioning aid. Conversely, a demon might arrange to summon its Demon- Blooded daughter to a dungeon in Malfeas (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) if she ever disobeys a direct order or reveals her infernal heritage to anyone she is not actively trying to kill.
Whenever the target of a Conditional Blessing or Curse performs the requisite actions, the spirit knows. At any time, it may then immediately activate the triggered Charm as a reflexive action to end the Conditional Bless- ing/Curse regardless of distance or withhold its benediction/ wrath until it can learn more about the target's actions. This Charm and its mark also fade without effect if the target does not meet the established conditions by the next Calibration. Only spirits and other beings capable of perceiving Essence at work can see the mark of an extant Conditional Blessing/Curse. " end imprecation --> conditional_curse
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网系统绘制一个架构图，核心是从边缘控制到云端数据流的完整链路。我想从执行器控制器开始，这是整个系统的触发点。
明白，执行器控制器作为起点。那它的下游连接是什么？是直连PLC逻辑，还是先经过遥测数据流？
先走遥测流。执行器控制器产生的事件数据需要先进入IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream，这是数据上云的关键通道。
好的，已建立从执行器控制器到遥测流的连接。接下来遥测流应该接入PLC逻辑层吗？
对，遥测流汇入PLC逻辑。这里PLC_Logic是核心决策节点，负责处理遥测数据并下发控制指令。
连接已完成。我注意到PLC_Logic后面似乎还有层级，需要继续展开吗？
是的，PLC逻辑需要再分出一个分支叫scourge，同样是PLC_Logic类型，但承担更严苛的故障处理逻辑。
scourge也是PLC_Logic？这意味着它是同一类型的冗余节点，还是逻辑上的子模块？
是逻辑子模块，专门处理紧急停机、设备校准异常等极端场景。保持同类型是为了复用控制协议。
理解了，已添加从主PLC逻辑到scourge的分支。现在遥测流这边还有别的连接吗？
有，遥测流还需要引出一个条件诅咒模块，这是给玩家指南用的特殊功能。
conditional_curse也是遥测流类型？它和主遥测流是什么关系，并行还是子流程？
是子流程，但要用子图包裹起来，标注为Players Guide。conditional_curse作为延迟触发器，依赖主遥测流的数据。
已创建Players Guide子图，并将conditional_curse放入其中。连接关系也画好了。
等等，我漏了一个层级。在遥测流和主PLC逻辑之间，应该还有一个malediction节点，也是PLC_Logic类型。
收到，我调整一下链路。之前直接连了遥测流到PLC逻辑，现在中间插入malediction作为中间处理层。
正确，这样链路变成：遥测流→malediction→主PLC逻辑→scourge。malediction负责数据预处理和异常标记。
层级清晰了。但执行器控制器那边，是否需要标注为tiny_damnation这个内部标识？
是的，内部开发代号是tiny_damnation，但显示名称保持IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController。遥测流对应imprecation，malediction和scourge保持原名。
已更新内部标识。现在所有节点都带有点击回调的详细信息，包括成本、持续时间、类型等属性。
scourge的回调内容里，需要包含对Ability、Attribute、Willpower、Essence的永久损失描述，还有关于面部毛发或眼睛颜色等物理特征的变更。
已核对，scourge的回调包含永久Attribute损失、Ability损失、Willpower和Essence损失，以及物理特征变更。另外也提到了MQTT Broker相关的Charm效果。
conditional_curse的回调需要强调延迟触发机制——它是另一个Charm的延迟触发器，可以是正面意图的祝福，也可以是负面意图的诅咒。
已完善conditional_curse的描述，包含Compassion/Valor双路径、Essence标记、条件设定，以及精神可以任意设置复杂或简单条件的说明。
malediction的回调里，要提到它可以扭曲Charm效果，比如Natural Prognostication或Landscape Travel的负面变体，并且涉及EdgeNode。
确认已包含。malediction可以赋予目标一个扭曲的Charm效果，持续不超过一周，并且明确引用了IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode。
最后确认整体主题用dark模式。整个架构从tiny_damnation出发，经过imprecation分流，主干经malediction到PLC逻辑再到scourge，支线进入Players Guide的conditional_curse。
全部确认。工业物联网架构图已完成：dark主题，五个主节点带详细回调，层级关系清晰，Players Guide子图独立封装。可以交付了。
